situation: Audit audit-2026-07-03-002 finding XT-WAN-M03: global mutable `weights` in prediction-engine.js:97 read on every computeSunsetScore call. If setWeights() invoked during batch, predictions within same batch silently use different weight vectors — non-deterministic output with no error signal.
action: Modified computeSunsetScore to accept optional weightsSnapshot parameter; modified computeAllPredictions to snapshot weights once via getWeights() at batch entry and pass frozen snapshot to each computeSunsetScore call. Backward compatible — direct callers fall back to module-level weights.
outcome_evidence: Commit b34a449 on auto/opt-wanxia-1783025398 branch. git diff --stat shows 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-). computeAllPredictions now calls getWeights() once at entry; computeSunsetScore uses passed snapshot or falls back to module weights.
next_suggestion: Next pending finding: XT-WAN-L01 (priority 6, route-fix) — add YYYY-MM-DD validation on /predictions date param in wanxia routes.js:111. Reuse opt-wanxia-1783025398.
